sample_explanations.conflict_reason: The paths of V6091 (north) and V9936 (east) cross at the intersection.
sample_explanations.waiting_time_reason: V9936 must yield to V6091 as V6091 is traveling straight and arrives earlier.

sample_explanations.conflict_reason: Vehicle V1309 (north) and Vehicle V3853 (east) are on a collision course as they approach the intersection.
sample_explanations.waiting_time_reason: Vehicle V1309 must yield to Vehicle V3853 as it is turning right and V3853 is traveling straight.

sample_explanations.conflict_reason: Vehicle V4321 is traveling north in the same lane as V3599, but V4321 is approaching a different destination (B) while V3599 is heading to A. They do not conflict as they are in the same lane and direction.
Vehicle V3775 (east) and Vehicle V4282 (north) conflict as their paths cross at the intersection.
sample_explanations.waiting_time_reason: Vehicle V4282 is approaching from the right side of Vehicle V3775, thus it has the priority.

sample_explanations.conflict_reason: Vehicle V4694 (east) and Vehicle V4926 (west) are on a collision course as their paths cross at the intersection.
sample_explanations.waiting_time_reason: Vehicle V4926 must yield to Vehicle V4694 as it is on the right side when facing the intersection.
